name: Workspace Application
description: A complete internal worker application for government case management, permit processing, or queue-based work. Combines a side navigation menu with multiple page types for an efficient workflow.
context: Internal government staff managing cases, applications, permits, or other work items
whenToUse: Case management systems (child services, permits, applications)
Internal processing queues and work assignment
Any internal government application requiring authentication

projectSetup.description: Required setup for workspace apps to function correctly at runtime. Missing any of these will cause runtime failures.

entryFile.description: main.tsx or index.tsx MUST import web components for GoA styles to load
entryFile.example:
// main.tsx - CRITICAL: Import web components FIRST
import '@abgov/web-components'
import React from 'react'
import ReactDOM from 'react-dom/client'
import { BrowserRouter } from 'react-router-dom'
import App from './App'
import './App.css'

ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <React.StrictMode>
    <BrowserRouter>
      <App />
    </BrowserRouter>
  </React.StrictMode>
)

indexHtml.description: index.html MUST include Ionicons CDN scripts for GoA icons to render

typescript.description: TypeScript configuration notes for strict configs
notes: Use `import type { TypeName }` for type-only imports to avoid bundler issues

scrollInfrastructure.description: Workspace apps should have scroll-aware headers that collapse and show shadows when content scrolls. This creates a polished, native-feeling experience.

behavior.no-scroll: Content fits without scrolling - full card chrome (all rounded corners, all borders)
behavior.at-top: User hasn't scrolled yet - top chrome only (rounded top corners)
behavior.middle: User is scrolling through content - side borders only, header shadow visible
behavior.at-bottom: User has scrolled to bottom - bottom chrome only (rounded bottom corners)

ScrollStateContext.description: React context that tracks scroll position of the content container

WorkspaceContent.description: Inner component that applies scroll state to the content container

css.description: Required CSS for adaptive card container based on scroll state

appStructure.navigation: GoabxWorkSideMenu (EXPERIMENTAL) with primary, secondary, and account sections
appStructure.state: Context providers for menu state, page header, notifications

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Landing page with personalized metrics and quick access to priority items

pages.name: My Cases
pages.description: Filtered list of cases assigned to current user

pages.name: All Cases
pages.description: Full searchable list of all cases with filtering

pages.name: Case Detail
pages.description: View and edit individual case with tabs

pages.name: Search
pages.description: Global search across all record types

pages.name: Notifications
pages.description: List of system notifications and alerts

app-layout.purpose: Main app container with side menu and content

clients-content-padding.purpose: Responsive horizontal padding for page content

table-wrapper.purpose: Margins for tables inside scroll container

desktop-card-container.purpose: White card container for content area

searchUtils.sortData: Sort array by key and direction
searchUtils.getEventValue: Parse event value from CustomEvent or React event

badgeUtils.getPriorityBadgeProps: Map priority to badge type and content
badgeUtils.getStatusBadgeProps: Map status to badge type and content
badgeUtils.getTypeBadgeProps: Map record type to badge props

dateUtils.isOverdue: Check if date is past due
dateUtils.isDueSoon: Check if date is within threshold

mockApi.mockFetch: Simulate API delay for realistic loading states

MenuContext.purpose: Manage side menu state (collapsed, mobile drawer)

ScrollStateContext.purpose: Track scroll position for adaptive card chrome and header state

example.description: Complete workspace app shell with routing, contexts, and scroll state

dependencies.experimentalNote: WorkSideMenu components require importing from '@abgov/react-components/experimental' with the Goabx prefix (not Goab)

src/.App.tsx: Main app with routing and providers
src/.index.tsx: Entry point with React DOM render

contexts/.ScrollStateContext.tsx: Scroll position tracking for adaptive chrome

considerations: Use GoabxWorkSideMenu for consistent worker app navigation
Implement responsive behavior (collapsed menu on mobile)
Use context providers for shared state across pages
Page header should update dynamically based on current page
Include notification badges on menu items
Handle loading states with skeletons on all data-fetching pages
Implement proper error boundaries for graceful failure
Use React Router for client-side navigation
Consider keyboard navigation and accessibility throughout

wireframeMode.description: This template supports wireframe mode for early-stage validation. Press Cmd+. (Mac) or Ctrl+. (Windows) to toggle between production and wireframe appearance.
wireframeMode.purpose: Use wireframe mode when showing early concepts to stakeholders to get structural feedback on flows and navigation, not visual details.
wireframeMode.toggle: Keyboard shortcut Cmd+. / Ctrl+. toggles wireframe mode
